creator: stitzinger_rupert@web.de
text:
Scilab 4.1.1. crashes, when executing the startupfile "scilab.star". Commenting out "load(""...macros//util.lib"")" in the standard "scilab.star" leads to a running sciab which is not real useful. When started with "scilab -ns" (no scilab startup file) scilab runs and the startupfile can be executed with "exec("".../scilab.star"")"

Fix: 

None
How-To-Repeat: Start scilab
